title: Deadly MV Hondius Hantavirus Outbreak Is Over, W.H.O. Says
summary_full: The rodent-borne virus, which sickened passengers on the MV Hondius, killed three people, led to a race to find its origin and a global health alert.
summary_public: The rodent-borne virus, which sickened passengers on the MV Hondius, killed three people, led to a race to find its origin and a global health alert.
